programme.desc: Granny, along with Elly, is heading back to the hills to do some doctoring. Mr. Drysdale is frantic to stop her so he reveals that the Brewsters are having a baby. Jethro brings home some girls from the Kit Kat Club so he won't be lonely.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A shady magician sells his wares to the gullible Jethro.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny brews a batch of her tonic hoping it helps Elly get a husband. Jane and Mr. Biddle are trying to hatch a condor egg but a sip of the potion changes the birdwatcher's focus and the Clampetts need to get him out of a tree.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny receives a box from Cousin Pearl in the hills. One of the items in the box is an old-fashioned crank telephone. Granny asks Jethro to hook it up to a party line on the pole, so she can listen in on the party line

programme.desc: Granny despairs of Elly Mae ever finding a husband and decides to promote her non-existent cooking skills. She is entered into a TV show cook-off, but nothing she fixes is edible.

programme.desc: Jethro is chopping wood while a chimpanzee named May Bell watches. He wishes that he could teach May Bell to chop wood. When Elly May comes by, she and Jethro talk and decide that they want a gorilla.

programme.desc: Jed takes a job on the board of directors of O.K. Oil Company.

programme.desc: In order to buy Mrs. Drysdale a special Christmas present, the Clampetts take seasonal jobs in a department store.

programme.desc: Granny discovers Martians next door at the Drysdale mansion.

programme.desc: The Clampketts come across Narda and Yerko, two gypsies, who decide to run a scam on the unsuspecting clan. Involving both a marriage prophecy and a curse, the crooks see the families' naivety to their advantage.

programme.desc: Dylan's friendly gift to Kelly upsets Gina; Steve is unnerved by a psychic's bitter prediction; David and Claudia lay the groundwork for their faux marriage; a high-school nemesis asks for Donna's help; Matt prepares to advertise on TV.

programme.desc: Kelly and Dylan subdue a man who tries to attack a pregnant woman and her child. Gina receives an offer to become a skating commentator. Noah reveals that he has a half-sister, who is working at a nearby diner.

Mary has a terrible time trying to be polite to Fox, who is rude and obnoxious yet potentially important to Lester's financial future.
When Mary and Rose win the services of a butler in the church raffle, they look forward to the pampered life until they meet the pain-in-the-neck hired help.

Mary, Rose and Pearl may be sent 'up the river' after they go overboard defending '227' against a graffiti artist who then sues them for assault--and it seems even bleaker when the key to their defense is the testimony of a lone eyewitness--Sandra.
Mary and Rose help Pearl face the loneliness of old age by escorting her to a single's bar where she meets the man of her dreams--and promptly gets engaged.
When Mary reluctantly agrees to partner with Sandra in the pillow-making business, she finds herself doing all the work--with Sandra reaping all the 'benefits.'

Lester turns into a real pain for Mary when he comes home from work early complaining of a stomach ache, but when she sneaks out for a pedicure, Lester is stricken with appendicitis--leaving Sandra to care for him.

Alarmed that her biological clock is winding down, Sandra sets out to find a perfect husband to father her child, but when she strikes out with the available men, she decides to have a baby anyway--regardless of her marital status.

programme.desc: Reza, MJ, Mike, Lilly, Asa and GG discuss the season with Andy Cohen.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: The Shahs ring in the Persian New Year surrounded by loved ones and friends; during the celebration, Mike picks a fight with Asifa's boyfriend, Bobby, over a fashion misstep, prompting Reza to step in as peacemaker.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Mike's girlfriend, Jessica, completes her conversion to Judaism with an ocean swim; GG reveals a secret she's been harboring since the group's trip to Turkey; while the gang soaks up the sun, Mike faces off with Asifa's boyfriend, Bobby, again.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: A guest makes controversial comments at the retreat in Malibu, Calif., sparking a heated argument.; Reza names MJ as his maid of honor; Reza's fiancé's parents visit for the first time, laying bare an old family wound.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: When details about the trip to Turkey emerge, Reza, Asa and MJ start to wonder if GG is telling the truth; Reza starts to wonder if his relationship with Adam is going stale; GG finds out about Mike's engagement and spills the beans to the rest.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: While Asa and Reza debate breaking their promise to GG in order to warn Mike about the rumors, GG beats them to the punch and confronts Mike about what happened in Turkey.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Mike separates himself from the group; MJ enlists the help of Reza to prepare her boyfriend for a surprise brunch with her mother; Asifa and Bobby finally move in together; Mike pops the question to his longtime girlfriend, Jessica.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Reality sets in for Reza as he faces the truth about marrying Adam; GG enlists MJ's help to get back into the dating scene; Asa nears a breaking point; everyone agrees to a game of dodgeball to relieve pent-up tension.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: Despite growing reservations about his relationship with Adam, Reza goes on a diet in anticipation of his upcoming nuptials; Mike dives into wedding planning while trying to reconnect with Reza; GG takes a polygraph test; MJ suffers a loss.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: In Hollywood, Asa creates an art piece involving a flash mob with veiled performers; GG takes a second polygraph test with surprising results; Mike tries to make peace over dinner, then Jessica unleashes a martini-fueled tirade against the crew.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset
programme.desc: With wedding plans still unsettled, Reza decides to have a destination wedding in Thailand; Asifa gives herself a Bollywood themed birthday party; Reza rescinds Mike's wedding invitation, creating chaos at Pablo's memorial service.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When voodoo priestess Angelique Morel does a reading and learns she will be murdered, and then is actually poisoned, questions arise as to who could do this and how it leads back to members of her family.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: After a woman arrives at the police station to confess she killed her bullying husband, no corpse can be found.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Richard's job is on the line after someone is murdered while handcuffed to him.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Dwayne and Fidel must solve the apparently impossible murder of a local diver.

programme.title: Death in Paradise

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: A woman with two identities is found murdered in her bed with her house ransacked and Poole discovers she was about to expose a money-laundering scheme.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Uptight inspector Richard Poole is sent to investigate the murder of an English policeman whose body was found in a locked panic room.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When the body of newlywed Lisa Moore is found in a room for which she had no key, minutes after her wedding, it's discovered that she may have been having an affair with her murderer.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: It is Louisa's first day back at school, and their new child minder Mel is late for work. When Mel finally does arrive, Martin is dubious about handing James over.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Dr. Martin Ellingham seeks out Louisa to talk about his new job in London, but they are interrupted by Bert, who wants to plan a baby shower for Louisa.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: New receptionist Morwenna Newcross gets off to a bad start after arriving late on her first day, and her hyperactive behavior leads Martin to believe she is high on drugs.

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: Doc Martin

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y Parker hacen un viaje para encontrar a una de las víctimas del asesino en serie. Además, el agente Knight se infiltra en una gran empresa manufacturera para investigar la posible vinculación de la compañía con los asesinos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Gibbs y McGee se dirigen a Alaska mientras el equipo trabaja en casa para descubrir la conspiración detrás del asesino en serie.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el caso de un detective que fue asesinado antes de testificar contra un criminal de carrera.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan el asesinato de una madre soltera cuyo exesposo tiene un historial de violencia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando un famoso jugador de baloncesto aparece muerto por una aparente sobredosis, Danny investiga sus posibles vínculos con una banda local de drogas.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: El caso se vuelve personal para Danny cuando trabaja para proteger a la enfermera Faith Madson (Jessie Mueller) de su violento exnovio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Al encontrar un cuerpo en Atlanta cubierto de rasguños. La UAC cree que esta muerte y posteriores homicidios podrían estar relacionados con una persona que tiene un trastorno obsesivo de la piel.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando un chico que desapareció en San Diego el día de Halloween reaparece un año después, la UAC debe funcionar con rapidez cuando otro chico en truco o trato desaparece bajo circunstancias similares.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC está perpleja al encontrar el denominador común entre las víctimas masculinas en Montana, lo que hace difícil el perfil del sospechoso. JJ debe enfrentar sus sentimientos respecto a la trágica muerte de su hermana.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas con grandes seguidores en las redes sociales son encontradas muertas en Maryland, la UAC busca un sospechoso asumiendo la personalidad de una leyenda urbana de Internet.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo del NCIS busca a Gibbs después de aparecer los restos de su barco, descubren que estaba rastreando a un asesino en serie con la periodista Marcie Warren (Pam Dawber), que escribió una denuncia sobre él.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras trata de encontrar al asesino en serie que buscaba Gibbs, el equipo de NCIS descubre que otra persona también ha estado rastreando el caso.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/14/2017. As deforestation rages and unique species vanish, the fight is on to save one of the planet’s most special places before it is ruined forever.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 4/24/2016. Anthony Bourdain explores the Philippines at Christmas and eats at beloved chicken chain Jollibee, samples sisig and indulges in the popular dessert halo-halo.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/1/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the iconic Old Town Ale House, eats mapo tofu in Chinatown and shares a home-cooked meal with rapper Lupe Fiasco.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/8/2016. On the island of Naxos, Anthony Bourdain dives to a sunken shipwreck, drinks raki with locals and samples cuisine fresh off a fishing boat.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 5/15/2016. Anthony Bourdain visits the Crow Reservation, hunts with podcast host Joe Rogan and eats dinner at Butte institution Lydia’s Supper Club.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/14/2013. Anthony Bourdain explores one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia: Myanmar, the city of Yangon and the remote Bagan temple.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/21/2013. Anthony Bourdain visits Koreatown in Los Angeles, where he finds a tight-knit community marked by the 1992 Rodney King riots.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 04/28/2013. Colombia has changed immensely over the past 10 years. Anthony Bourdain explores several regions of the country, from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown
programme.desc: Aired 05/05/2013. Chefs and restauranteurs Fred Morin and Dave McMillan, of Joe Beef’s, take us across Canada by rail.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/20/2016. Bill Weir journeys to the heart of Cuba to meet America's distant neighbors, bracing for a tourist invasion.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 03/27/2016. More than two-thirds of babies in Iceland are born to unmarried parents. Will this nation be the first to let go of marriage completely?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/03/2016. America’s most iconic river sustains more than 40 million people in the West. But as populations boom and the waters recede, will it continue to flow?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/10/2016. Can this magical kingdom of Bhutan, the happiest place on Earth, stay blissfully content as the modern world begins to encroach on its remote borders?

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 04/17/2016. The stunning wildlife of Africa is under threat. Bill Weir goes on a safari to meet the naturalists battling to save creatures from extinction.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 12/18/2016. Bill Weir travels to Amsterdam, famed as one of the world's most liberal cities, to find out if it can stay that way amid a rising tide of intolerance.

programme.title: The Wonder List
programme.desc: Aired 10/07/2017. What’s the best way to protect paradise? In stunning Patagonia, an American conservationist has purchased vast tracts of land to the fury of local developers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police try to settle a dispute between roommates, a jilted man causes a disturbance at a public park twice in one day, and an erratic driver proves to be surprisingly sober.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Tinted car windows draw suspicion from a roaming patrol, a concerned friend gets a punch in the nose, and a traffic stop leads police a meth pipe in an odd place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arrested on warrants just wants his wife, a vagrant is caught on camera stealing from a liquor store, and officers check on a woman asleep on the side of the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist takes flight, police find a woman at the wheel of a stolen truck, and officers roll up on a couple smoking meth while their four-year-old is in the car with them.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The threat of a tasing is enough to slow a fleeing suspect, a heated argument between girlfriends leads to vehicular assault, and a man with weed in his car has no poker face.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An unstable man in a standoff with officers begs to be shot, a drunk woman is accused of beating her spouse, and unwanted guests occupy the garage of an out-of-town homeowner.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A trespassing man uses his dog as a shield when police arrive at the scene, a stolen tablet leads to a bloody altercation, and kittens run wild in a Florida neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Finlay must deal with a bomb planted in her car, while Russell gets a call from someone claiming to be the Gig Harbor killer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a robbery and fatal shooting at a medical marijuana shop.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sara and Greg are quarantined after responding to a crime scene contaminated with a deadly pathogen.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team suspects foul play when a chemistry teacher's science experiment goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Morgan, Sidle, and Finlay try to relax at a forensics conference when a mass shooting occurs on site.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Frustration mounts for the CSI team as another victim surfaces, and all evidence points to the Gig Harbor Killer. Guest stars include Mark-Paul Gosselaar, Mark Valley, and Patricia Arquette.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman full of alcohol and drugs in a pool at a rehab facility.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team delves into the kinky world of "rubber dolls" when they investigate the murder of a man stabbed in an alley.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a murder at Clark County jail after an inmate stumbles upon a body while running away from officers.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the bizarre death of a man who was killed not once, but twice. Sharon Osbourne guest stars as Elise Massey, the manager of a billiards championship.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI's investigation of the victim of an apparent hit-and-run leads them into the world of aeronautics.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team reopens a 10-year-old murder/suicide case when the sole survivor claims her accused father was innocent.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team learns the main suspect in the gig harbor killings is being released from jail due to lack of evidence.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates a homicide at a convention for people who collect macabre murder memorabilia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga a un desconocido que aparece muerto después de lluvias torrenciales en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar a un hombre que apareció muerto dentro de una bola para hámster de tamaño para humanos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI es llamado para investigar el apuñalamiento de una pareja.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un fin de semana de spa para algunos de los miembros del equipo de CSI se convierte en una investigación de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato en una fiesta elaborada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un asesinato a bordo de un avión que acaba de aterrizar.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen es llamado para investigar un choque de autos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga dos casos, cada uno de los cuales podría ayudar a resolver el otro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga la muerte de una joven de 16 años que está ligada a un burdel.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga los asesinatos de un imitador de Elvis.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga el asesinato de una seguidora de estrellas de rock and roll.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI investiga un caso de personas extraviadas que involucra a toda una familia.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un ataque a la estación de policía se convierte en una crisis de rehenes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de Investigación de la Escena del Crimen investiga a un asesino canibal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A savage double murder in the Everglades pits Horatio and the CSI team against the brute force of Miami's own Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When the CSIs investigate a murder in Miami's hippest fashion boutique, Horatio discovers that Julia's instability has turned her into a ticking bomb.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A 200-foot crane crashes into a Miami high rise, putting Calleigh and Delko in jeopardy and killing Horatio’s hope of catching a renowned crime boss.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A man is found handcuffed and stabbed in his hotel room, while a prank at the lab causes a rift in the CSI team and threatens their investigation.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murderer kidnaps an innocent baby, Horatio and the CSI team must find him before the child becomes his next victim.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a savage killer runs rampant in Miami, Horatio must intervene to stop a member of the police force from getting too close to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a shooter targets the motel where Delko is staying, Horatio and the CSI team must look into Delko's past to find the killer.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team, with the help of local tipsters, fights to save a neighborhood on the brink of being taken over by a violent street gang.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSIs use radical technology to unlock the secret of a man's mind when he shows up covered in blood with no memory of where he's been.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a murder occurs during a horse race, Horatio and the CSI team discover that Ryan has a personal connection to the case.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Calleigh is in a coma after a smoke inhalation injury sustained while investigating a case involving a dead doctor, drug dealers, and black market organ transplants.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSIs make a shocking discovery about their murder victim, while Horatio tries to save his son from Julia's erratic behavior.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a flight attendant is murdered en route, Horatio Caine and the CSI team uncover all the dirty secrets of airplane travel.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A home invasion becomes much more when Horatio Caine and the CSI team find out they're being targeted by the Russian mob.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Todd Burton está tratando de salir de la furia del huracán cuando mata a un hombre en medio de una tormenta que le impide ver y ahora lo acusan de homicidio vehicular involuntario.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un gasista se ve envuelto en llamas invisibles y muere. Todo esto sucede durante una carrera clasificatoria del Gran Premio de las Américas.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio finalmente cierra el caso del asesinato de su hermano. Se reencuentra con Suzie, una ex-drogadicta que estuvo involucrada con su hermano.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que ven a una mujer siendo atacada por un tiburón, el equipo de CSI descubre que fue asesinada antes de ser arrojada al agua.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Una joven es arrojada por la barandilla de un estacionamiento, la investigación sobre su muerte revela pruebas de que la asesinaron antes de la caída.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Después de que encuentran muerto a un anestesiólogo de cirugía plástica por un aparente suicidio, Horatio cree que podría ser un caso de asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un corredor de diamantes es asesinado a tiros en un estacionamiento, un hombre con discapacidad mental presenció el asesinato y quiere ayudar a Horatio a resolver el crimen.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando asesinan a un hombre, Juan Marco Varón, que puede haber torturado o no a refugiados cubanos, llaman al equipo de CSI para investigar.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y su equipo se adentran en el mundo de las celebridades e investigan el asesinato de un paparazzi. Él descubre que la víctima fue testigo de otro asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Ted Henderson muere en su propia casa y su cuerpo está desaparecido, mientras que dejan a su esposa y su hijo con vida, pero golpeados y atados.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En los Everglades, cerca de un incendio controlado, Alexx y Delko registran la escena del crimen. Se ven obligados a protegerse cuando un muro de fuego los alcanza.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio llega rápidamente al lugar cuando asaltan a un camión blindado que transporta 3.2 millones de dólares en un atrevido atraco en el centro de la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Wally Shmagin se convierte literalmente en parte de la escena de un crimen después de robar un guante de látex para agregarlo a su colección forense personal.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Un periodista escurridizo es el único testigo de un asesinato y Horatio sospecha que puede estar buscando una historia mucho más importante.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs are called to a Brooklyn housing project to investigate the murder of a successful businessman who felt the pull of his old neighborhood.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Mac is shot, he finds himself in limbo between life and death, as he fights for his life, it’s up to his team to bring the shooter to justice.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when a fire chief – a friend of Mac’s – is killed in a blaze that used the same technique as a recently paroled arsonist.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team rushes to stop serial arsonist Leonard Brooks after he begins using fire against people from his dark past.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Evidence found in photos at a crime scene on the Brooklyn Bridge sends Mac and Jo to San Francisco in search of a missing teenage girl.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team of investigators race to catch a shooter when Lindsay is injured during the attempted murder of a political candidate.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: Mac investigates a 20-year-old case involving a missing boy when the prime suspect is found murdered on the anniversary of the boy’s disappearance.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate a twisted fairy tale when a woman in a ball gown is found at the bottom of the pond outside Belvedere Castle in Central Park.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a psychiatrist’s patients are being systematically murdered, the CSIs are forced to play along in a game of Clue in order to catch the killer.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSIs must delve into the high-pressure world of elite prep schools when a student is murdered while studying for the SAT’S.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When Det. Lovato’s cover is inadvertently blown, the CSI's investigate the Latin street gang she infiltrated when undercover.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team investigates a 1920s-inspired speakeasy when one of its owners is murdered and $10,000 goes missing.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The CSI New York team is confronted with a puzzling mystery when two different victims are linked by the same unusual weapon.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: When a beloved off-duty NYPD officer perishes in a robbery, the CSIs use the art of interrogation to break down their suspects and get to the truth.

programme.title: CSI: New York: El triángulo (S5 Ep10)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI se ve obligado a investigar dos crímenes a la vez con un misterioso campo de energía cerca del Empire State Building en el centro de ambos.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fruta prohibida (S5 Ep11)
programme.desc: Parece que el equipo de CSI tiene un caso sencillo después de que un sospechoso de asesinato queda empalado durante una persecución policial, pero resulta que recién está comenzando.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ayuda (S5 Ep12)
programme.desc: Las futuras novias se pelean por un vestido espléndido en la venta de vestidos de novia más grande del año y una de las compradoras termina muerta.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Juicio apresurado (S5 Ep13)
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI debe armar un rompecabezas humano cuando las partes del cuerpo amputadas de un querido entrenador de lucha se encuentran enterradas en toda la ciudad.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ella no está ahí (S5 Ep14)
programme.desc: Encuentran a un turista ruso muerto a puñaladas y el equipo de CSI se enfrenta cara a cara con la aterradora realidad de la trata de personas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: La fiesta terminó (S5 Ep15)
programme.desc: Cuando el cadáver del alcalde cae del techo en una recaudación de fondos de caridad, Stella y su cita se encuentran en medio de la escena del crimen.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Ninguna buena acción (S5 Ep16)
programme.desc: Cuando a un buitre que vuela sobre Manhattan se le cae un globo ocular humano de la garra, comienza la carrera para encontrar el cuerpo al que pertenece.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Parque verde (S5 Ep17)
programme.desc: Una bomba casera destruye una casa de Manhattan y valiosas evidencias, lo que obliga al equipo de CSI a ser creativo en la reconstrucción de las pruebas.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Punto sin retorno (S5 Ep18)
programme.desc: Encuentran asesinado a un ex médico forense y un polvo blanco hallado en el lugar le brinda al equipo de CSI una importante pista para rastrear al asesino.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Error de comunicación (S5 Ep19)
programme.desc: Cuando un jefe indígena de EE. UU. recibe un disparo, el equipo de CSI lucha por traducir cuál de los varios sospechosos extranjeros pudo haber causado su muerte.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Presa (S5 Ep20)
programme.desc: Mientras investiga la muerte a tiros de un hombre en un teatro vacío, Stella se da cuenta de que la escena del crimen es extrañamente familiar y planeada.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Pasado, presente y homicidio (S5 Ep21)

programme.title: Rosario
programme.desc: Una mujer mata accidentalmente a su marido mientras actuaba en una obra de teatro.

programme.title: El abogado del mal
programme.desc: Jamie Foxx presenta la inspiradora historia real del director de una banda de música de instituto que transformó a su variopinta banda de jazz en un legendario grupo de funk que arrasó en todo el país.

programme.title: Desapareció una noche
programme.desc: La desaparición de una niña en un peligroso vecindario de Boston, une a dos detectives privados con la policía en este fascinante misterio.

programme.title: Babel
programme.desc: Del aclamado director Alejandro González Iñárritu (Amores Perros, 21 Gramos) llega el tercer filme de su trilogía, Babel, una película aplaudida por la crítica y de una gran emotividad sobre las barreras que separan a la humanidad.

programme.title: La isla siniestra

programme.title: Lars y una chica de verdad

programme.title: Persiguiendo un sueño
programme.desc: Decidido a reconstruir su familia después de que su madre drogadicta sale de prisión, Rey (Taylor Lautner) secuestra a su hermano menor y escapa de su hogar en el desierto hacia la costa de California.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: El chico de oro
programme.desc: Como “El Elegido”, Murphy está en una alocada misión para salvar al Chico de oro, un joven con místicos poderes quien ha sido abducido por un culto maligno.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: The Man Who Shot Liberty Valance
programme.desc: Jimmy Stewart plays the bungling but charming big-city lawyer determined to rid the fair village of Shinbone of its number one nuisance and bad man: Liberty Valance.

programme.title: Sabata
programme.desc: Get ready for fast-paced, explosive action as Lee Van Cleef stars as Sabata, the mysterious, steely-eyed gunslinger who, after he discovers the masterminds behind an elaborate bank heist, imposes his bullet-laced brand of justice on a guilty town.

programme.title: Return Of Sabata
programme.desc: The great Lee Van Cleef ('Death Rides a Horse') returns as the famous freewheeling gunslinger Sabata. In this third and final go-round for the enigmatic sharpshooter, Sabata seeks revenge when a band of desperadoes bilks him out of $5,000.

programme.title: Adios, Sabata
programme.desc: Under the brutal rule of garrison leader Col. Skimmel, a group of Mexican revolutionaries hire gunslinger Sabata (Yul Brynner) to rob a transport of gold in order to buy weapons. But the Colonel has other plans...taking the gold for himself.

programme.title: The Magnificent Seven (1960)
programme.desc: Yul Brynner stars as one of seven gunslingers pitted against an army of marauding bandits in this rousing classic that made stars of Steve McQueen, Charles Bronson, and James Coburn. Eli Wallach also stars in this timeless tale of good versus evil.

programme.title: Return of the Seven
programme.desc: Starring Yul Brynner and a stellar supporting cast that includes Robert Fuller, Warren Oates, and Claude Akins, this classic western adventure follows the legendary Magnificent Seven as they thunder through Mexico to face the shootout of their lives!

programme.title: Guns of The Magnificent Seven
programme.desc: In this thrilling follow-up to one of the greatest Western sagas in film history, notorious desperado Chris Adams (George Kennedy) is offered a huge reward to free a young Mexican revolutionary from prison…in the midst of the Mexican Revolution.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: The Seven Year Itch
programme.desc: With his family away for their annual summer holiday, New Yorker Richard Sherman (Tom Ewell) decides he has the opportunity to live a bachelor's life. The beautiful but ditsy blond (Marilyn Monroe) from the apartment above his catches his eye.

programme.title: Some Like It Hot
programme.desc: This hysterical comedy from director Billy Wilder finds Tony Curtis and Jack Lemmon masquerading as women in order to elude irate Chicago mobsters while befriending a beautiful singer (Marilyn Monroe).

programme.title: The Apartment
programme.desc: Jack Lemmon, Shirley MacLaine, and Fred MacMurray are superb in this tale of love and ambition in the world of big business that went on to garner a Best Picture Oscar.

programme.title: Irma La Douce
programme.desc: Set in Paris' famous Red Light district, a rookie policeman (Jack Lemmon) plots to keep a beautiful prostitute (Shirley MacLaine) all to himself in this hit comedy from director Billy Wilder.

programme.title: Kiss Me, Stupid
programme.desc: In this comic gem from the legendary Billy Wilder and his long-time writing partner I.A.L. Diamond, Dean Martin is a famous singer targeted by two would-be songwriters who encourage a waitress (Kim Novak) to coerce Dino into a song-buying mood.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: In a frantic effort to get Arthur and Vivian married, Maude plans a weekend wedding in wintry New England but the wedding party becomes snowbound in a Vermont train station.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie is tired of being the butt of Pinky Peterson's practical jokes and sets out to get revenge by fixing Pinky up on a date with Beverly Lasalle.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: The outspoken Puerto Rican nurse that Archie met at the time of his operation moves into Mike and Gloria's old room.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When Mike and Gloria are preparing their will, they have problems with having Archie and Edith as guardians for little Joey.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos

programme.desc: A pregnant basilosaurus, an 18-metre, carnivorous whale which lives in the Tethys Sea, is forced to kill the young of a smaller whale to ensure the survival of her unborn calf.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Going back 25 million years to the time of the indricothere, which was the largest mammal ever to live on dry land, being seven metres high and weighing 15 tons! The only threat to an adult would have been the hyaenadon which was the size of a rhino.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: The beginnings of mankind can be traced back 3.2 million years to Ethiopia and the advent of Australopithecus, a type of ape which, like humans, was bipedal. These early members of the human family faced many dangers, including the sabre-toothed cat.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Revealing the exotic, oversized creatures that inhabited South America one million years ago, such as the deadly smilodon, the largest of all sabre tooth cats.

programme.title: Walking with Beasts
programme.desc: Looking at the depths of the Ice Age, following a group of mammoths who have been forced to travel south with the advent of winter. On a dangerous journey across the Alps, many become trapped in bogs or fall victim to predators.

programme.title: Horizon

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This scientific detective story traces the evidence for Big Al the allosaur's existence, using clues from climate change studies, forensics, and fossil records to bring him back to life.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Web Planet

programme.desc: With the Doctor held captive by the Commander Lobos and destined to become an exhibit in the space museum, his companions are left to do whatever they can to break the chain of events.

programme.title: Classic Doctor Who: The Space Museum

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Chase

programme.title: Dog Whisperer

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to restore the peace between a Chihuahua mix and a Mastiff, and tackles an out-of-control pit bull puppy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: When Susan MacDonald met Cobar, an Australian koolie dog, she thought it would be a match made in heaven, but she was wrong; a Shar-Pei mix is afraid of his own reflection.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A wheaten terrier mix is so attached to her owner that she won't leave his side; a shar-pei who is aggressive towards other dogs.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: An English Bulldog who is destroying her owner's house and aggressive towards their other dog; Howie Mandel's chihuahua is aggressive towards him and his wife.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A border collie/greyhound mix with an aversion to other dogs; a woman tries to tame her dog's nervousness; a large dog with too much energy.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar helps Casey Anderson, of "Expedition Wild," and his wife, actress Missi Pyle, with their dogs; a pit bull's fears make him aggressive.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: A dogo Argentino with canine aggression; a terrier/corgi mix who becomes aggressive when faced with traveling.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Mufasa, a South African boerboel, became aggressive after being pinned down by another dog; Tucker, a teacup poodle, behavior becomes more aggressive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to liven things up with a competition. He and Beth will hunt for one fugitive, while Leland and Justin chase another. The winner will be the duo that captures its fugitive first. Will Dog keep bragging rights as the Best Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once a criminal himself, Dog knows how it feels to be hunted. In this episode, Dog and the team delve into the depths of Honolulu's Chinatown as they search for a young Samoan girl who's gone down the wrong path. After a frustrating day of hunting, D

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: While hunting an elusive deep sea fisherman, Dog is also trying to plan a great Mother's Day for Beth, but he's having problems finding the special flowers Beth wants.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is hunting a man known as The Godfather of Waikiki. Dog and Beth bailed him out as a courtesy, but now he is refusing to go to court. If Dog doesn't bring him in, it could cost him more than money; he may lose his respect on the street.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has a big problem. Patty Estabilio has jumped a $15,000 bail bond and disappeared into Hawaii's underworld. Kissing the kids good night, Dog and Beth, with Tim and Leland at their side, plunge into a drug-infused netherworld.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Justin is the low man on the totem pole in the Chapman clan, and this means that the rest of the team is always teasing him. But Justin wants to be a full-fledged member of the team, and Dog has a fugitive that will be his test case.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team return to their roots, with a visit to their home town of Denver. Dog and Tim begin the day with an early morning radio show appearance, and it pays off when a listener calls in with a tip about one of the fugitives they're hunting.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Denver Dog discovers that recapturing the past can be more difficult then tracking down felons. On a day of more misses then hits in their fugitive hunting, Dog and Beth repeatedly collide with reminders of their early days.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog hunts down Chris, a fugitive wanted on drug charges. Dog turns over every rock, but to no avail. Later, they decides to revoke the bonds they holds on Chris's mother and stepfather because they've violated the conditions of their own bonds.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after Virginia, a hard-to-find lawbreaker. He gets a tip that a pickup truck will be going to Virginia's house. In true private-eye fashion, the team tails the truck in two SUVs, regularly switching the follow car to throw off their scent.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog decides to sweep the island clean of as many fugitives as he can in two days. Raymond, wanted on drug charges, is an easy grab. Mauro, wanted for solicitation, is busted. And a Samoan, Siamau, is convinced to fly back to Hawaii from L.A.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog goes after a fugitive named Tracy who lives in a homeless shelter, but the shelter's staff is uncooperative, and the two sides get into an angry confrontation that forces Dog to temporarily back off.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog juggles his job and family responsibilities at the same time. He leads the search for Robert, a low-level drug dealer. As he hunts down Robert, Dog gets on the phone to tell Beth not to spend too much money to furnish Leland's Honolulu apartment.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Upset because one his puppies may die and wanting to give the little guy a second chance in life, Dog decides to offer one of the fugitives a second chance, too. He captures Paul, a meth addict, then steers him to a rehab program instead of jail.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team are out to revoke bail on Eugene, a chronic heroin addict. They find him in a squalid apartment with a huge stockpile of syringes, and they can see that his physical condition is deteriorating.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and his team fight the war on ice-crystal methamphetamine-on many fronts. They appear on a special anti-drug float in a parade. Then they go after bail-jumping Pana, a convicted drug dealer.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Hunting down a fugitive known as "Bozo," Dog gets help from an unexpected source, Bozo's father-in-law.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and the team get a big surprise after they track down Bosco, a fugitive who they believe is addicted to methamphetamines. They discover he's off drugs, settling into a normal life with a new girlfriend, and is very friendly.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Leland has a full plate of fugitives in Kona, and the whole family heads to the Big Island to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog visits his mother's grave for inspiration before heading out to find Frankie, a violent fugitive hiding in the jungle. The spirit of Ma Chapman seems to help when Dog finds an unusual ally; Frankie's mother.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog lectures high school students about the dangers of drugs before going after Joseph, a dangerous fugitive who won't be easy to capture.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog takes the day off to try his hand at coaching, and assigns Tim and Leland to track down a dangerous fugitive on their own. Can the boys prove they can handle it?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The boys get distracted by the bikini-clad lovelies on Waikiki when they hunt for Lucy, a homeless, alcoholic fugitive. Beth is amused by the boys, but this is serious business: Tim will have to pay the bond if Lucy isn't caught.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog faces a tough personal and professional situation when he must hunt down his friend, Ili, who has helped him on many busts. But now Ili's on the other side of the law, and now Dog must bring her in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is out to make two grabs on two islands in one day. Part of the team is goes to Kona to nab a woman who skipped her court date. Meanwhile, Dog and the others hunt Patrick, a fugitive who's fighting in an Extreme Boxing event on the Big Island.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog has only a few days to catch a woman nicknamed Cats or forfeit Beth's $10,000 bond. But it won't be easy - Cats is eight months pregnant, so Dog will have to lure her in rather than risk a violent grab.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in for a big surprise after he catches a fugitive named Jonaven in a sting operation.

programme.title: The Dog Rescuers
programme.desc: Alan Davies returns for a brand-new series of The Dog Rescuers and it’s going to be bigger and better than ever. On this week’s show, German Shepherd puppies covered in their own mess and eating raw meat off a filthy floor.

programme.title: AKC National Championships 2017
programme.desc: Watch night 1 of the 2017 AKC National Championship presented by Royal Canin.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian returns to Jacki Barlow's alpaca farm to investigate a worrying lump in the mouth of one of the animals. Peter carries out dental surgery on a Yorkshire terrier and Julian examines a pygmy-goat.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: Beverley Mahood meets with the Boccanfuso sisters, who are looking for a puppy to watch over them while at school. They visit with West Highland Terriers, Wheaton Terriers and Airedale Terriers, but when each sister likes a different dog, things get …

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Dog eating wedding cake; 80 years, 80 candles; Grandpa drops cake on lap.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter heads to an old friend's farm on his day off to help with a tough lambing. Julian meets a very unusual creature - a European polecat called Poldark. Staff treat a French bulldog puppy requiring complex surgery.

programme.title: Pet Heroes
programme.desc: The heroic actions of one Mountie and his dog lead to the creation of the first RCMP Dog Unit. And when a young boy disappears into the woods, a family’s only hope for his survival are the two puppies that are by his side

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian rushes to dedicated farmer Alan Inman's place to help a mum to be whose baby is breached. Time is of the essence as he struggles with the delivery. Can he get the baby out before it's too late?

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The smith family is looking for their very first family dog. Who knows which one they will pick after visiting with the Linnois, the Barbet and the Cairn-Westie Cross.

programme.title: Pick a Puppy
programme.desc: The Trikah family is looking for a new dog that can keep up with their three active boys. Can dad stay calm with all those cute puppies from the Rhodesian Ridgeback, the Miniature Smooth Dachsund and the Vizsla?

programme.title: Dog Tales Rescue
programme.desc: Rob and Danielle travel to Israel to rescue dogs; a visit to some pigs on a farm.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Peter treats a ewe that is struggling to give birth to twin lambs and also performs a complicated and risky surgery on a tawny owl to remove the bird's ruptured eyeball.

programme.title: Funniest Pets & People
programme.desc: Giraffe sticks head and tongue into car; 2 seats bicycle accident, loose 1 passenger; terriers attacking hose from pool.

programme.title: The Litter: The Litter
programme.desc: The puppies get to explore outside, learn behavior skills, and find their forever homes! Narrated by Sharon Osbourne.

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: In this episode, Peter gets a call to help a Mother ewe deliver her baby lambs, but there are complications when Peter finds out the two are tangled in the womb.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The baby is recovered from the real kidnapper, Alfred Grimes, and it turns out he's the father of Roger Grimes. Fallon fires Susan. Claudia leaves for a sanitarium. Fallon starts looking for a job. Blake gives her his hotel La Mirada.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Cecil leaves his estate and Colbyco to Jeff and Alexis. He also reveals his "Rhinewood" game to Blake at the reading of his will. Blake suspects Alexis of being a part of it.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis gives her newfound long-lost son Adam a job at Colbyco. Blake starts to believe that Adam may actually be his real son. Fallon and Adam keep flirting with each other, not knowing they are siblings. Adam has dinner with Krystle and Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake tries to be friends with Adam, but Adam rejects him. Alexis tells Mark that he's still married to Krystle. Mark seeks to get a job as a tennis pro at Fallon's hotel.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Joseph's daughter, Kirby comes to stay with the Carringtons after breaking up with her fiance in France. Joseph tries to persuade her to go back to him. Mark gets the job at Fallon's hotel. Blake tries to get help from Congressman Neal McVane.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Fallon gets a letter from Steven and it turns out he's on an oil rig in the Java Sea, Indonesia. Adam mixes the toxic compound in the paint for Jeff's new office. Fallon hires Kirby as a nanny for little Blake.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff starts to become dizzy and affected by the toxic paint Adam used in his office. Joseph tells Kirby to stay away from Jeff. Krystle goes to Acapulco to find out what really happened with the so-called divorce from Mark.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: The Carrington family is informed that Steven's oil rig exploded. Blake goes to look for him, with an uninvited Alexis. Sammy Jo's father returns to Denver to collect Sammy Jo's share of Steven's inheritance, but Krystle throws him out.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis and Blake continue the search for Steven in Indonesia but find evidence that Steven might be dead. Blake refuses to believe it, and hires a psychic, Jason Denner, to help. Jeff gets really ill from the paint in his office. Adam rapes Kirby.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Back in Denver, Blake continues his frantic search for Steven with the help of psychic Jason Dehner. Blake refuses to believe his son is dead, and Krystle is worried about his erratic behavior. Fallon mends fences with stepmother, Krystle.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: An obviously ill Jeff continues to function in a confused state. Sammy Jo announces she's headed for New York to make it big as a model and no longer wants to keep her son, Danny. Blake offers the girl $100,000 to be a mother to the child.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Jeff's temper continues to grow more volatile. Adam attempts to implicate Jeff in the Cecil Colby/Logan Rhinewood scandal. After learning that Blake and Krystle intend to adopt Steven's son Danny, Alexis demands custody of her grandson.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Although Blake begs her to postpone taking action until Jeff's violent behavior can be explained. Fallon flies to Haiti to obtain a divorce; Mark shows up unexpectedly at her hotel. Alexis tells Adam she cannot allow Jeff to be poisoned.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Alexis is concerned the doctors will learn the truth behind Jeff's illness, but Adam tries to cover by ordering his office remodeled and the lethal paint compound removed. Mark and Fallon get closer in Haiti.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2006, Darlene VanderGiesen received threatening emails and then disappeared. Tracking the source of the emails led police to the home of Daphne Wright, where they believe a murder was committed.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Responding to a 2008 garage fire, Illinois emergency response discovered a man crushed beneath a truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2007, the Florida mobile home of Effie and Michael Ratley catches fire. Michael heroically rescues his wife and infant son. A month later, his wife is found beaten to death in a bedroom of his parents' home.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, David Castor suffered a slow, agonizing death over a period of days. His wife maintained it was suicide, even though it was done with antifreeze.

programme.desc: In the 1990s, the media dubbed Richard Rogers the "Last Call Killer" because he targeted men in gay bars who were obviously intoxicated.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Avis Banks and her unborn child were brutally murdered. The body was discovered by her fiancé, Keyon Pittman. When police learned that Pittman was having affairs with other women, he became the prime suspect.

programme.desc: In 2003, Tiffany Rowell and three of her friends were brutally murdered in affluent Clear Lake, Texas.

programme.desc: In 2004, Rebecca Barney and her soon-to-be ex-husband Fred were found shot to death in their Tulsa, Oklahoma, home, which had been set on fire.

programme.desc: In 2003, Kathy Lorick was murdered on a Concord, California jogging trail while talking to her husband on her mobile phone.

programme.desc: In 2004, nursing student Tamika Huston went missing from her Spartanburg, South Carolina home. A tip led detectives to her car, where they found an unknown house key that could help solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2002, funeral director Lonnie Turner, Sr. was found shot to death. His son Lonnie Jr. became the prime suspect, particularly after it was discovered that the murder was committed with his gun. However, he had an alibi for the time of the murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: As the ghosts converge around and mobilize the Preeminent into a hulking giant behemoth, the Ninja use Airjitzu to fight the mobile beast in an attempt to slow it down.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After the defeat of the ghosts and the destruction of the Cursed Realm, the ninja finds themselves famous all over Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With Destiny’s Bounty impounded, the police hire Ronin to track down the fugitive ninja. Misako has been arrested and is confronted by Nadakhan, who reveals he has trapped Wu in the Teapot of Tyrahn.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: With the ninja imprisoned, Nadakhan uses the Realm Crystal to free his old crew. The ninja encounter Captain Soto, the first captain of the Destiny’s Bounty, who tells them the story of how he originally trapped Nadakhan in the Teapot.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The secret, he says, is the venom of a Tiger Widow, a rare creature that lives on only one island. The venom can slow a djinn down. Soto is the only one who knows where the island is and will only tell if the ninja breaks him out of jail.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nadakhan vows revenge on the ninja and NINJAGO. The ninja and Soto escape from jail, only to find out the map to the island is on Nadakhan’s ship. Nadakhan discovers that Nya looks just like Delara, his long-lost love.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja’s search for Nadakhan’s ship turns up nothing. Nadakhan’s crew is struggling to handle an airship that used to sail only on the oceans. Nadakhan confronts Jay and talks him into making a wish that will win him Nya.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay reveals to Cole that he made two wishes with Nadakhan. Large chunks of NINJAGO City are disappearing without a trace. The ninja find the Tiger Widow Island on the map but it is an island that exists on no other chart or database.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay is trapped on Nadakhan’s ship, as Nadakhan tries to force him to make his third wish. Lloyd, Cole, and Nya are marooned on Tiger Widow Island.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja are trying to figure out a way to save Jay from Nadakhan’s ship. Two screenwriters, Kevin and Dan, suggest that they build a fake raid zeppelin and disguise themselves as Sky Pirates.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Jay and Nya have been holed up at the police precinct, but the Sky Pirates track him down. They flee by boat to the lighthouse where Zane’s father was once held captive. Nadakhan learns that the ninja still have the Tiger Widow venom.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Master Wu mistakenly tries to single-handedly complete a battle he began decades ago against Acronix, one of the twin Hands of Time.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja learn more about the Krux and Acronix – the two fallen Elemental Masters known as the Hands of Time – and are sure that this threat has finally been eliminated.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the midst of an epidemic of mysterious metal thefts by the Vermillion Warriors, Lloyd realizes that stepping up and taking over for the ailing Master Wu is not an easy task.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: While the Ninja fight to save MegaMonster Amusement Park, Jay struggles to defend his family's home from the Vermillion Warriors.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Secrets are revealed as Nya confronts the Samurai X imposter, Kai pursues the truth about his parents and the other Ninja desperately seek to locate and rescue Master Wu. But as usual, some answers only lead to more questions.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai confronts his dad for aiding the Hands of Time, only to discover that his parents are actually Acronix and Krux's captives.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Hands of Time blackmail Kai and Nya into using their combined Elemental powers to retrieve the fourth and final Time Blade from the Boiling Sea with the promise that the siblings can use its reversal power to save the quickly-fading Master Wu.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai and Nya stow away aboard Krux and Acronix’s time-traveling snake mech in a desperate attempt to save Master Wu. But when they arrive in the past, they must help the Elemental Masters prevent the Hands of Time from re-writing Ninjago history.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When an unknown criminal syndicate threatens the Royal Family, the Ninja are called back into action and must protect the royal princess and a fabled artifact that may hold supernatural powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In the wake of a vicious attack upon the palace, the Sons of Garmadon steal the second Oni Mask, and the ninja invite the royal princess, Harumi, into their makeshift family.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.desc: As Lloyd and Harumi venture deep into Primeval’s Eye in search of the third Oni Mask, the ninja attempt to fix the Bounty and make a startling discovery.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Viendo la tele en la sala de su casa de repente el Abuelo y el Noruego son golpeados con una nueva idea para lucrar en un popular programa de TV. Mientras tanto Peluzín se aventaja de un descuido de Gaspar.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: It's Showtime at the Apollo
programme.desc: It's Showtime at the Apollo is a syndicated music television show, first broadcast on September 12, 1987. The show features live performances from both professional and up-and-coming artists, and also features the Amateur Night competition.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali is interviewed.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Mrs. Georgia Jackson, mother of slain Soledad Brother George Jackson, is interviewed by producer- Ellis Haizlip. Other show features include the exciting Latin-jazz sounds of seven man combo.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: This program traces the roots of Black protest in America by means of passages from Frederick Douglass' greatest orations, dramatized by Arthur Bufghardt, interspersed with performances by drummer Max Roach.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Author James Baldwin is interviewed by the young Black poetess Nikki Giovanni in a special two-part presentation of Soul!, taped in London.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: The second installment in a special, two-part program featuring James Baldwin.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Featured guest Bill Withers sings hit single, "Ain't No Sunshine" and other selections from his album, Just As I Am. In another segment, young poetess Mae Jackson reads from her own works.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Former heavyweight boxing champion Muhammad Ali, South African born singer Miriam Makeba and a three-man vocal group called the Delfonics, share the spotlight with guest-host Nikki Giovanni, who opens the show with her "Kidnap Poem".

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: Singer Jerry Butler headlines this episode, together with his back-up group, Peaches. Highlights of their numbers are "Make It Easy on Yourself" and "Brand New Me".

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: An all jazz line-up on this edition of Soul! features pianist Horace Silver at the electric keyboard, Lee Morgan on trumpet and 22-year old Bobbi Humphrey playing the flute. They are joined by vocalists Andy and Salome Bey.

programme.title: Soul!: The Complete Series
programme.desc: One of the great Motown acts of the past several years headlines the show, performing the hit, "I Heard It through the Grapevine", and other selections.

programme.title: Wildlife ER
programme.desc: Rounding up ducklings and helping a lost koala.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: Argentina's towering peaks, vast steppes and huge glaciers are home to some of the most rugged creatures on the planet.

programme.title: Slovenia: Where nature comes first
programme.desc: Get closer to nature and deepen your understanding of our complex natural world. Filmed in the highest quality, Love Nature offers viewers powerful stories of nature's beauty and wonder from around the globe.

programme.title: How the Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: There is an endless variety of sleep-strategies among animals, yet it seems a universal behaviour; trying to see how animals cope without sleep or the dangers of being unconscious in the wild.

programme.title: Webs & Wings: Nature's Tiny Ballet
programme.desc: Get wowed by the pest-killing prowess hidden beneath the ladybug's cute shell.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Naturalist Steve Backshall free dives into the world of whales, orcas, and dolphins as he explores their habitats, relationships, behaviors, and the threats faced by these mammals.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Steve returns home to the Atlantic waters of the British Isles as he considers the question of what humanity can do to ensure the enduring future of whales.

programme.title: Qatar - Pearls in the Sand
programme.desc: Exploring Qatar's untamed wilderness, unique wildlife and human innovations.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Elands lock corkscrew horns; storks rattle sabre-shaped beaks; rhinos scare the competition with massive horns; striped marlins spear unsuspecting prey.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: Tasmanian devils get into food fights with rivals; how dung beetles roll over the competition; wild boars' fierce mating strategies; hyenas' bone-crushing teeth demolish any meal.

programme.title: Alien Abyss
programme.desc: Exploring the bizarre mating rituals of the ocean's most peculiar creatures; learning how bloody battles for mates, gender bending, and super-size litters of babies might secure a next generation for these animals.

programme.title: Wild Argentina: Extreme Earth
programme.desc: The filmmakers shed light on Argentina's dangerous Atlantic coastline, where orcas hunt young sea lions and penguins use clever tricks to protect their offspring.

programme.title: Europe's Amazon
programme.desc: Tour a biodiverse flood plain at the confluence of the Drava and the Danube.

programme.title: Extreme Snakes
programme.desc: Takes a look at Africa's various snake species that have adapted and evolved to thrive within the vast continent.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #14 Episode 0: The First Contact
programme.desc: The stickup that started it all! Lupin and Fujiko are both after an ancient artifact Jigen is supposed to protect, while Goemon happens to be searching for his clan's lost treasure nearby. Of course, Inspector Zenigata isn't far behind.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #15: Operation: Return the Treasure
programme.desc: Lupin sets his sights on the legendary Trick Diamond, stolen by his late rival Mark Williams. Instead of finding the diamond, Fujiko relays Mark's dying challenge: return all the other treasures he stole to reveal the location of the gem.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #16: Swallowtail Tatoo
programme.desc: A mysterious criminal captures Lupin and Fujiko with a very specific order: in order to save Fujiko's life, Lupin must infiltrate a high-security museum and steal the Bull's Eye jewel. One little problem: the jewel is cursed to kill anyone who steals it.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin's new target is the digital currency gained from the transactions made on this site. Lupin sneaks into a massive high-security server facility, known as the "twin towers". Lupin greets the guard to the key, a young girl and skilled hacker "Ami".

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Hunt down the greatest thief of our times, Lupin III!" The Marco Polo executives have set a trap in the form of the Lupin Game. This has people all over the world tracking down Lupin.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Shinpei Mayama, the Rat Clan, Union Mama... the all-stars of assassination, from all over the world, suddenly come after Lupin. They're players in a new game started by the executives of Marco Polo: Happy Deathday.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Fujiko smiles deviously as she points her gun at Lupin, when Zenigata arrives to save him and Ami. They get into the inspector's car which takes off, but it's soon attacked by soldiers who are trying to cash in the price on Lupin's head.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot in the head by a drone fighter. With the death of its target, the Lupin Game is concluded. Time passes, and people forget about the game. Released from his duty of hunting Lupin, Ami now lives with Zenigata, when one day Goemon visits her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: The "Smart Safe" has come to the Greater Tokyo Bank. Lupin is goaded by Fujiko and Jigen to try and crack the technological wonder. What can he do against this peculiarly secure safe?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is hired by Gaston to retrieve a painting, and manages to do so easily enough... except the painting has a strange resemblance to a real Picasso piece, forcing Lupin to examine the truth behind why he was hired.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin visits Gaston's grave. There he meets the elderly Camille, with who he goes out for a drink when the pub's phone begins to ring. On the other end of the line is the supposedly dead Gaston.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is shot, and Albert gets his hands on the notebook. Lupin is saved by Jigen and Goemon and manages to survive his injuries under care. He then explains his past with Albert and how they know each other.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: After learning the shocking truth about Jose's terrifying plot, Lupin heads to Jose's headquarters with Albert, his old thieving comrade. Jigen and Goemon fight off the heaviest opposition while Lupin and Albert head into the heart of the enemy territory.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: To steal the fortune of the Drug King Pablo, the gang heads to South America with Fujiko. As Fujiko distracts the target, Lupin picks off the remains of Pablo's guards while making his way through the jungle.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: In a rural town in France, full of cosplayers. Within the town celebrating a pop-cultural event is Goemon. Next to the inn, he decides to keep watch at is Chloé's Bistro. Chloé is exactly the woman Goemon was looking for Lupin's current target.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Having enrolled at the Annecy School for Girls, Ami encounters a strange girl in the garden who aims her bow at a crow. The girl is Dolma, the princess of the Kingdom of Padar. Having no friends, Ami finds herself opening up to the odd Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: "Princess Dolma, please save Padar." With that request, Dolma is taken home. Lupin follows shortly, and Ami decides to accompany Fujiko to Padar in order to save Dolma.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: Part 5 + 50th Anniversary Special
programme.desc: Lupin is pierced by Dolma's arrow. Ami and Fujiko take Lupin and escape, hiding in a deserted building. The three of them decide to flee, with Lupin badly injured.

programme.title: MST3K: Bride Of The Monster
programme.desc: Horror cinema icons Bela Lugosi and Tor Johnson star in this Ed Wood classic as the crazed Dr. Vornoff and his beastly assistant Lobo, who conduct heinous experiments on human victims in an effort to create a race of atomic super-beings.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: City Limits
programme.desc: Set in the future, a teenage gang battles a corporation for control of an abandoned city in City Limits (1984). Crow sings a song devoted to Kim Cattrall and the guys try their hand at a City Limits trivia game.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000
programme.desc: Future War was the most recent film ridiculed by the Satellite of Love crew, proving once and for all that movies aren’t always turned bad by age.

programme.title: Mystery Science Theater 3000: Attack of the Giant Leeches
programme.desc: Hillbillies, holo-clowns, and a giant leech named Patches abound when Joel and the Bots take on this bloodsucking tale from acclaimed producer/director Roger Corman.

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills
