programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Todo parece indicar que el desmadre este año lo empiezan a poner los nuevos discípulos. Victor trata de seducir a Elettra, Isaac juega con Adela para ver quien tiene el control y Ferre tontea todo el tiempo seduciendo a Eva hasta que se pelean.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Llega el boss, es italiano y tiene carácter, comienza regañándolos y los envía a trabajar crudos. Isaac está de cumpleaños y recibe muchos regalos, incluido el de Adela. Elettra come una pizza que la pone cachonda. Una gran alegría llega a Rimini.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Hay tensión en la casa, Adela está de malas con Elettra que no entiende cual es el problema, pero el problema es que ella se está ligando a Isaac adelante e Adela y a este parece no importarle.Victor y Potro se dicen sus verdades.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Karime y Elettra arman un plan para ligarse a Ferre y a Isaac delante de Adela y Eva porque no les gusta su actitud irrespetuosa, estas dos están un poco sorprendidas por lo que pasa y no saben bien como enfrentarlo.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones van a tope para todos menos para Eva que parece no disfrutar lo que está viviendo, ni la llegada de su amigo Pietro logra sacarle el mood negativo a la francesa de fuego. Al mismo tiempo la casa está en shock por un chisme.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Los shore llegan a Roma. Hay discusiones por ver quién se queda con quién en el hotel. Potro está molesto porque Karime y Elettra se quedan con Víctor y se roban el cuarto del amor. Toda la belleza romana invadida porn los shores que cantan.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Mucha tensión en las mini vacaciones en Roma, Potro parece alejarse definitivamente de Karime y gasta una broma al grupo muy pesada. Danik y Elettra finalmente chocan en una pelea dura que divide a la casa.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: El clima enrarecido cambia una vez más con la llegada de Tadeo a la costa adriátrica, es que Ursulo media muy bien entre todos y de a poco se gana al grupo y lo une, además se gana el corazón de Elettra que muere por él.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La familia vive un viaje a Venecia a tope, junto con Tadeo y Paula la nueva integrante de la familia. Por la noche en Venecia, algo pasa en la habitación de las chicas que traerá cola y que nadie puede terminar de confirmar muy bien

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Una verdadera guerra se desata en la casa desde la llegada de Paula.Parece no tener límite. Luego de que el chisme del que habla toda la casa salió a la luz, Paula pelea muy fuerte con Isaac y todo el mundo reacciona empeorando el descontrol.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: Las vacaciones se van terminando y a la vez está a tope. Los chicos están con el nivel de desmadre al 100. Ligues, body shots, guerra de pizza, fiestas desmadrosas y bromas pesadas. Todo esto no hace olvidar que Aranxta se va.

programme.title: Súper Shore
programme.desc: La familia se despide de Italia con la promesa de que el verano próximo se volverán a encontrar más en familia que nunca.

programme.desc: Parish chairwoman Lois Springfield is found dead in a local theater.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: An elderly woman is found dead in her own cottage and DCI Tom Barnaby (John Nettles) is convinced the death is not a simple accident. Guest starring Emily Mortimer.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: After a noted author speaks before a group of local Midsomer writers, the naked body of the event's host is found bludgeoned to death in his bedroom.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Barnaby donates time to the local amateur dramatic society when his wife Joyce is cast in a revival of "Amadeus," but complications arise when the leading man is murdered onstage.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When the wife of a wealthy local businessman disappears, Barnaby finds that Fawcett Green harbors a complex web of financial and romantic entanglements.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: DCI Barnaby needs all his wits about him as he investigates a string of deaths at a local New Age commune.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The Barnaby's plan to renew their wedding vows for their 25th anniversary when Tom is distracted by a murder committed with an Indian sword in Badger's Drift.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The nude body of a Brazilian woman is found strangled in the woods, which suggests that a serial killer from nine years before has begun killing again.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik and Ryan are joined by Steve Gold, a former fashion model who has become a successful agent, specializing in luxury properties; Ryan hopes to sell 50 houses in three months; a newly calm Fredrik meets a Tribeca seller who won't negotiate..

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan and his Brooklyn team sell as many houses as possible; in order for Fredrik to land a building in SoHo, he has to prove that he's done his homework; Steve wonders if he's become a babysitter when his young clients refuse to behave.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik needs to find a back-up buyer, and Bethenny Frankel is at the top of his contact list; Ryan lands two townhouses but ends up competing against himself; Steve gets a listing, loses a listing and gets another listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik lands a building with $400 million dollars in potential sales, but his boss thinks he may have over-promised in order to get it; Ryan juggles two sellers; Steve gets a list of demands from a broker and makes one of his own.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: In the hopes of selling a $20 million unit in his new mega-tower, Fredrik calls on everyone he knows, including agent Michael Lorber; Ryan goes toe-to-toe with his buyer's wingman, social media influencer The Fat Jewish.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When Ryan lands a $25 million dollar listing in Tribeca, he calls upon his most intense team member for help; in Chelsea, Steve's listing for his friend, Sam, continues to have problems, but it's nothing compared to his dating life.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When a seller demands Ryan remove his team member from a $25 million Tribeca listing, he hatches a plan that includes a secret twist; Steve lands an opportunity to sell an amazing $18 million SoHo penthouse; Fredrik and Ryan reconnect with Luis.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik begins questioning the effects of gentrification as he sells his $225 million development in the historic East Village; Ryan starts to doubt his sales strategy; Steve's co-lister tests his patience, nerves and even his bicycling skills.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Steve seeks to convince potential buyers that the only thing better than their Tribeca apartment is his listing right above it; a prominent developer embarrasses Ryan at a birthday party; Fredrik forges a bond with his driver, Alberto.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik tries to set records at the open house for his Park Slope brownstone; even though Ryan's business is booming, he finds himself down in the dumps; Steve encourages a friend to sell his Soho loft and receives an offer from an unexpected source.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik has a strategy for his new Nolita building, designed by Lenny Kravitz and his team, and he's going to need his passport; Ryan befriends a quirky apartment owner, only to find the rug being pulled out from under him.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: In Paris, Fredrik's launch goes according to plan until another broker tries to stake his claim with the developer; Ryan contemplates a risky new career move; Luis makes an emotional revelation concerning his life in Paris.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: The kings of Gotham real estate are back, and they refuse to let a changing market stand in the way of big-time deals; Fredrik is back with a bang to help Rebel Wilson find a luxurious NYC pied- à -terre; Steve gets himself in a tricky situation.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes on a penthouse listing where the owners have overspent; Steve hustles to sell his ex-girlfriend's apartment and her next-door neighbor's unit in record time; Ryan has to sell out a Brooklyn building for a first-time developer.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Fredrik takes on 50 Cent's Connecticut estate listing and throws an epic broker's open to entice buyers; Ryan has a chance at the biggest listing of his career but only if he can get to Shanghai in time; Steve takes on a stale penthouse listing.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: Ryan hits a speed bump in his attempt to get to Shanghai with $1 billion in business on the line; Fredrik's tensions with his co-lister put a potential deal in jeopardy; Steve gets a chance to work for a dream client.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing New York
programme.desc: When a deal falls through, Steve's solution for getting the unit sold may end up draining his bank account; Fredrik launches a NoHo development with a creative but risky marketing campaign; Ryan mentors a young broker on a townhouse listing.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Special-guest star Jill Haworth portrays a glamorous double agent, who uses her feminine wiles on Paris to set him up for an enemy plot on Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF attempts to clear an American businessman in Japan of false charges that he murdered his Japanese wife in "Butterfly," a segment of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible" series.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps falls in love with a woman that the IMF has been assigned to bring out of an iron curtain country over the seemingly insurmountable obstacles set in their way by the country's secret police in the "Decoy"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Before the IMF can get the prototype of an Iron Curtain country's secret weapon to the United States, part of the weapon falls into the hands of an unscrupulous, greedy nightclub owner, in "The Amateur"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: While rescuing an imprisoned patriot, Barney is critically wounded and must be left behind in order for the IMF to complete their mission in the "Hunted" episode of Paramount Television's "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Phelps poses as an archeology professor and Dana as one of his graduate students, as the IMF goes to the aid of a group of young guerilla fighters in an effort to obtain from them a notebook containing vital scientific information in "The Rebel"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A leading illegal supplier of heroin is dying of cancer and is about to designate a successor and turn over to him the only known list containing all the vital information about the entire drug operation.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Paris, still in his cover from a completed mission, is kidnapped and held hostage by a group of treacherous revolutionists in "The Hostage" on Paramount Television's award-winning series "Mission: Impossible."

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A political boss hires a professional provocateur to stage a violent protest, in a maneuver to discredit his state's governor and elevate his puppet, the mayor, to the governorship in "Takeover"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Hari Rhodes guest stars as George Corley, an underworld leader whose link with a police precinct chief is the object of Barney's brother's newspaper crusade in "Cat's Paw"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF devises an elaborate scheme to dupe foreign agent James Reed into stealing a bogus missile guidance system in "The Missile"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Henry Darrow guest stars as Gregory Tolan, the local leader of a revolutionist group specializing in robberies for the financing of a movement to overthrow the United States government in the "Blast"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: With the threat of another off-shore missile crisis and perhaps a confrontation that could lead to war, the IMF is called upon to expose a nuclear arms treaty secretly signed by a previously friendly country and a hostile power in "The Catafalque"

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF is called upon to free John Darcy, the leader of a liberation movement in West Africa, and end the tyrannical rule of his captor, Colonel Alex Kohler, a ruthless segregationist in the "Kitara"

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a dairy farm to see how cows are milked and milk is bottled. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, a contractor helps King Friday plan a budget for the pool. Neighbors decide to reduce costs by helping to dig the hole.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers goes to Brockett's Bakery to decorate gingerbread men. After hearing the sound effect from the laughing box, Lady Aberlin sees how long neighbors take to laugh. Eric Kloss makes different sounds using a wind synthesizer.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits his friend Adelia Moore to see how she makes stuffed animals for her children. In the Neighborhood of Make- Believe, the Neighbors are making presents for Ana Platypus' birthday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers has a gift for Mr. McFeely -- the Speedy Delivery Alphabet Book. Lady Aberlin and Prince Tuesday try to cheer up Daniel Tiger who is sad because he cannot say the alphabet as quickly as Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Mr. McFeely look at snow globes and see a film about how people make cereal. King Friday says he is the bravest and strongest in the neighborhood. Cereal is falling like snow. Mister Rogers goes to a Tae Kwon Do class.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a doll factory. Corney makes King Friday dolls. Lady Elaine is jealous. Mr. McFeely show Mister Rogers a swimming doll. Mister Rogers says he will take us to where he swims.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers talks about how children are curious about families that are formed by adoption and talks about his family's adoption of his own sister. He shows a film about different families in his Neighborhood.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett stops by along with three students who demonstrate their jump roping skills. Lady Aberlin encourages Prince Tuesday to tell his father he wants to stay at Someplace Else School.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday insists that the royal Hula Mouse must return to the Castle and asks Miss Paulificate to call "every person in the world." King Friday is flying around the world searching for the royal mouse.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a wooden toy airplane. Handyman Negri is working on a musical portrait of King Friday. Neighbor Aber provides his own tribute to King Friday as he mans his plane and draws a sky-written portrait of the King.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers reflects on a day when he went roller skating with his friend Stephen Lee. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make roller skates. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, the Trolley is still moving very quickly.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a garage where electric cars are being made, and he takes one out for a drive. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Handyman Negri organizes a search for Prince Tuesday, and the unhappy Prince is finally found.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: H.J. Elephant recieves help from Mayor Maggie as he reads his first words. Mr. McFeely stops by with a film about how people make ball caps. Before he leaves, Mr. McFeely is allowed to take one of Mister Rogers' caps with him.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how people make wooden rocking horses. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Mr. Aber gets a mask that makes him look like King Friday, and the Neighbors talk about the importance of making and keeping friends.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a television studio where the series Arthur is being animated. Mr. McFeely brings a video about how people make traffic signals. Arthur meets the puppets in the Neighborhood of Make-Believe.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers explains how a wheelchair lift works, and then shows one in action. He shows some of his puppets. Mayor Maggie and Neighbor Aber ride in a wheelchair until they have their checkups from Dr. Bill.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a film of an earthmover digging a hole. Mr. McFeely shows a toothpaste video. Lady Aberlin wears a tiger suit, so she can be related to Daniel. Daniel declares that they are related by their hearts.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: What do you do with the mad that you feel? Do you pound something, like some play clay or a steel pan? Mister Rogers visits people who make and play steel pans.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers plays dress-up with wigs and glasses, and says: “You can get dressed up in the fanciest of things, but the best style comes from inside, and it often spreads on your face with a smile.”

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: King Friday suggests that the Neighborhood of Make-Believe be turned upside down to see if the missing crown might fall out. Trolley finds the spare crown! Mister Rogers visits the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Renowned artist, Red Grooms, gives Mister Rogers a tour of his studio and the life-size bus "sculpture" he is working on. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine is angry that her Eiffel Tower drawing isn't turning out well.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Stories of those who believed in dreams and defied the commonplace with their extraordinary creations; covering some of the world's architectural and engineering structures, scientific inventions, and social wonders.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Constructing the Seattle Space Needle, the Canadian CN Tower and the Stratosphere in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The intrigue, politics, financial disaster, heartbreak and hope that went into the construction of the Statue of Liberty, France's gift to the United States.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: While blade implements have been in use since the Paleolithic Age, the discovery of metallurgy allows people to forge stronger, more versatile blade implements, including axes, swords and knives; an axe-throwing contest in Wisconsin; a sword fighter.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Built in 1931 on the Columbia River, the Grand Coulee Dam is one of the world's largest hydroelectric plants.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Inventions for holding off a global warming meltdown include giant solar energy towers, a rooftop wind turbine, a car that runs on air and a kite that tows a cargo ship.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The inner workings of the largest airports in the world, including ground control, high-tech security measures and customs.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Advances in technology allow designers of roller coasters to test the limits of the human body.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: After more than two millennia, the pyramids continue to inspire architects.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Medieval castles withstand both bloody assaults and the test of time.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Duct tape; transparent tape; flypaper; denture adhesive.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Engineers learn how to locate and extract oil and gas while faced with high winds and mountainous waves.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: Each flip of an electric-light switch attests to the genius of Nikola Tesla, creator of the alternating current (AC) system; the Tesla coil; energy-efficient bulbs.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The forts, weapons and technology of barbarians.

programme.title: Modern Marvels
programme.desc: The evolution of the assembly line, which has produced billions of products, from toys to Boeing 747s, cheaply and quickly; Americans overcome prejudices toward blacks and women in factories during World War II; a family of auto assembly workers.

programme.title: La vida secreta de los koalas
programme.desc: Este episodio explora cómo varía la vida de los koalas en diferentes partes de Australia. Sus poblaciones a menudo están aisladas, por lo que algunas prosperan hasta el punto de la sobrepoblación.

programme.title: La vida secreta de los koalas
programme.desc: Los koalas a menudo parecen estáticos y solitarios, pero la temporada de apareamiento marca un cambio dramático en su comportamiento. A medida que comienza la temporada de reproducción en Cape Otway en Victoria, seguimos a los grandes machos Rocky.

programme.title: La vida secreta del diablo de Tasmania
programme.desc: En este episodio nos encontramos con una serie de demonios de Tasmania que forman parte de una población que es monitoreada por conservacionistas. Carlos, de dos años, es uno de ellos. Seguimos sus búsquedas de comida, dominio sobre los otros

programme.title: La vida secreta del diablo de Tasmania
programme.desc: Aunque a los demonios de Tasmania les gusta su parte justa de las peleas, también son padres comprometidos que son heroicos en la defensa de sus crías criadas en bolsas. Este episodio aborda las batallas de la temporada de apareamiento

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat
programme.desc: En las tierras altas, cerca de las montañas nevadas de Australia, se encuentra una gran área boscosa, conocida como Wombat Wood. Salpicadas entre el denso follaje están las aberturas visibles de más de 100 madrigueras donde duermen los wombats.

programme.title: La vida secreta del wombat: La jornada de un joey
programme.desc: Los wombats suelen ser criaturas solitarias' y de movimiento lento', pero la cría de wombat es un momento de cambio, que genera energía, agresión y mucho juego.

programme.title: El Amazonas salvaje de Alemania
programme.desc: El Wupper: un río popular en Alemania y una de las mayores anomalías de todos los tiempos. Considerado una de las joyas del paisaje alemán, este hermoso río ha sido y sigue siendo un verdadero tesoro natural de Alemania.

programme.title: Groenlandia: un paisaje helado
programme.desc: Groenlandia es la isla más grande del mundo y la masa terrestre más cercana al Polo Norte. El 80% del país está cubierto por una capa de hielo de hasta 3000 metros de espesor.

programme.title: Rey de las montañas: el águila real
programme.desc: Apareamientos en el aire, duelos entre titanes alados y un vistazo al nido: un documental que revela el lado más salvaje y asombroso de las águilas.

programme.title: El hielo se derrite: el futuro del Ártico
programme.desc: El cambio climático en el Ártico no solo genera preocupación, sino también expectativas. A medida que el hielo retrocede, revela territorios inexplorados con valiosos recursos como petróleo, gas y minerales.

programme.title: La turbera
programme.desc: La película muestra la biodiversidad de un hábitat que a menudo pasa desapercibido: las últimas turberas intactas. Es un llamado silencioso, pero poderoso, a proteger y conservar estos ecosistemas únicos antes de que desaparezcan para siempre.

programme.title: El salvaje río Rin
programme.desc: Bosques aluviales, cascadas atronadoras, cañones escarpados y laderas soleadas flanquean el río Rin. Esta diversidad de paisajes es la razón de la extraordinaria biodiversidad que prospera a lo largo de su curso

programme.title: Los chimpancés del Congo rescatados, con Jane Goodall: El especial
programme.desc: La Dra. Jane Goodall crea un santuario, se reúne con el chimpancé Gregoire, la madre sustituta, La Vielle, y el huérfano Motambo.

programme.title: Milagros ocultos de la naturaleza
programme.desc: Las plantas se comunican, y se ayudan mutuamente a prosperar. La ciencia de vanguardia revela habilidades sorprendentes de las plantas.

programme.desc: Tammy sospecha que su marido Johnnie se acuesta con Renee y que Robert escucha a su hermana y le es infiel a su prometida adolescente Raven. Además, ¿Tom se acostó con la esposa de su mejor amigo?

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¡Brittany cree que Dionte es el padre de su bebé y lo demostrará! Después, Melissa, de 24 años, afirma que Rob, de 47 años, es el padre de su bebé, ¡pero la hija de Rob quiere pruebas!

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: ¿Probará Katrina, de 25 años, que Christopher, de 50 años, es el padre de su bebé y callará a su nueva novia, Suprina? ¿El padre del bebé de Sarah es Johnny o un hombre casado? Además, Robert niega ser padre de los bebés de dos mujeres.

programme.title: El show de Maury
programme.desc: Charlotte y Tasheun se acercaron por el padre de sus hijos en común, Brandon, en un álbum fotográfico, pero ¿la prueba de ADN lo confirmará? Luego, ¿probará Tanya que su bebé Craig III es el hijo de Craig Jr.?

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se enfrenta en discusión con Eduarda, justificando y dándole valor al odio sentido por Rosaura en contra de su familia, tras saber de la pérdida del hijo que Rosaura y él esperaban.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En el Spa, tras dejarse llevar por la provocación de Luis Mario, Rosaura invita a Rafael a ser parte de sus planes de revancha en contra de Eva y Luis Mario, al hacerlos testigos de su noviazgo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: A su llegada a la desierta isla, Luis Mario recuerda su lucha por sobrevivir al encontrarse abandonado en las profundidades del mar, tras ser víctima de un misterioso secuestro.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario se declara abiertamente ante Rosaura como su enemigo, al culparla de ser la responsable de su atentado. Rosaura acepta el desafío de Luis Mario y le proclama todo su odio.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura, en compañía de Doña Cruz, visita la casa de Rafael para informarlo sobre la situación que ella vivió en el Spa, en cual Eva amenazo Rosaura con muerte.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: En el Spa, María Julia y Rafael están sorprendidos tras reencontrarse casualmente, después de estar por más de 20 años separados.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Caridad recrimina a Rosaura por haber actuado en la forma que lo hizo en la boda de Eva. Luis Mario pregunta si todo es verdad y Rosaura le dice que si. Éll le dice que tiene que casarse con Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura sigue pidiéndole a Eduarda que se arrodille para que le devuelva todo. Luisana se confiesa con Fernando sobre sus fracasos amorosos con Bruno y con Silvia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le devuelve a Luis Mario las tierras y la casa. Él la besa, aunque ella al principio se niega pero al final accede. Eduarda y Camelia se golpean y llega Gabriel a enterarse de todo.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario rechaza a Eva y le dice que se siente mal por lo de su hermana. Cuando se queda solo, piensa en los besos Rosaura, no de Eva.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Eduarda zarandea tanto a Jimena que la hace caer y comienza a perder sangre. Luisana pide que llamen a la ambulancia. La fiscal no acepta la declaración de Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Todos en el hospital están nerviosos. Aparece una enfermera y le preguntan. Ella dice que la operación fue un éxito y que la madre está muy bien pero el niño no habla.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Rosaura le preguntan al doctor si el niño de Iván y Jimena va a vivir. Las muchachas comienzan a a preguntarle cosas a Jimena y ella les cuenta lo del adelanto del parto.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario lleva a Iván para hablar con el doctor. Le explica lo que ha pasado con su hijo y con la bebida de Jimena. La enfermera entra de improviso, informando que al niño le dio un paro.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles a set of magnetic twins, Sanji and Usopp fall victim to a pair of figure skating lovebirds, and Zoro has a drink with the man who stole the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Robin's cola care package helps spring her friends from an icy prison, and Luffy's bold words inspire a battered and beaten pirate to keep fighting!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Luffy continues his battle with the magnetic twins, Chopper uses a rumble ball in his battle with a hockey player – and Robin tries to recover the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy battles an opponent who's too hot to handle, Robin gets attacked by a jungle, and Chopper makes a heroic dash for the Straw Hat flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's red-hot battle with Papa threatens to destroy the entire icy island, and the rest of the Straw Hats need a little help from a former enemy to recover their flag!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The most adorable hero the world has ever known – Chopperman – must battle a hideously evil villain to regain control of his favorite television station!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While sailing through haunted waters, the Straw Hats encounter a ghost ship that's home to a walking, talking skeleton!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Straw Hats attempt to unravel the mystery of their new comrade, but the skeleton's sad story is interrupted by a ghastly landing at the haunted island of Thriller Bark!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After getting stranded at Thriller Bark, Chopper, Nami, and Usopp are chased by a three headed beast. Back on the boat, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats are terrorized by an unseen enemy!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Chopper, Nami, and Usopp get scared out of their minds when they encounter a graveyard full of zombies! Meanwhile, the rest of the crew gets trapped in super creepy sea web!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An invisible man turns Nami's bath time into a harrowing experience, and Usopp battles a hall full of haunted paintings with a handful of burning candles!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While Usopp, Nami, and Chopper seek to unravel the secrets of the haunted mansion, Luffy and the gang do battle with an army of the undead!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets his sights on the shadowing-stealing monster known as Gecko Moria, and the zombie army prepares for a night attack led by their perverted, invisible leader!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp, Chopper, and Nami get trapped in a coffin after being slashed by a zombie samurai. Meanwhile, Luffy and the rest of the Straw Hats make short work of some haunted paintings!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: After escaping from their coffin prison, Usopp, Chopper, and Nami do battle with a garden full of adorably dead zombie animals!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: An undead warthog sets her sights on Nami, Zorro and Sanji vanish without a trace, Franky and Robin battle an unbeatable army, and Luffy gets captured!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: A penguin zombie starts acting an awful lot like Sanji, Nami continues running for her life, and Robin and Franky buy some time by blowing up a bridge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Nami gives love advice to a zombie, Luffy finds himself face-to-face with Gecko Moria, and Robin gets caught in spooky spider web. Things look bleak for the Straw Hats until their skeleton friend lends a hand!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook strikes the final blow in his battle with the spider monkey, Gecko Moria's devious plan is revealed, and Luffy's escape attempt leads to the loss of something he can't live without!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Brook tells Franky and Robin the secret to slaying zombies, and Gecko Moria reveals the terrifying monster that will be the recipient of Luffy's shadow!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy's shadow is forced into the body of a monster, Usopp and Chopper get incinerated, and Nami is kidnapped by a zombie who wants to make her his wife!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Gecko Moria's minions struggle with the burden of feeding a giant zombie brought to life by Luffy's shadow. Meanwhile, Brook flashes back to a battle that almost cost him his beloved afro!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The freshly-revived trio of Luffy, Zoro, and Sanji discover that their shadows are missing, and Franky relates Brook's story about a promise he made to a very special whale!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the Straw Hats flash back to the heartbreaking story of Laboon the abandoned whale, and Brook's battle with the zombie samurai reveals the reason behind his intense afro love!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy sets out to regain his shadow and convince Brook to join the crew. Meanwhile, Sanji races to stop Nami's zombie wedding before it's too late!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Usopp's naturally negative personality makes him the only Straw Hat who stands a chance against Perona's depressing army of ghosts, and Chopper prepares to do battle against his hero, Dr. Hogback!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: When Brook is overmatched by the zombie samurai, Zoro steps in to help the skeleton get his shadow back. Meanwhile, Luffy prepares for a battle with Gecko Moria, and Sanji interrupts an undead wedding!

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Will Magnus's plan be the salvation of Abnormal-kind...or its doom?

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: The enigmatic Dr. Helen Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) recruits an insightful forensic psychiatrist Will Zimmerman (ROBIN DUNNE) to join her in the quest to track, study and protect the strange, and often terrifying creatures that secretly populate our world.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Ashley (EMILIE ULLERUP) is confronted by the sinister John Druitt (CHRISTOPHER HEYERDAHL) who possesses a powerful force and a baffling knowledge of her mother, Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING).

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Dr. Helen Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING), her daughter Ashley (EMILIE ULLERUP), and new to the Sanctuary, Dr. Will Zimmerman (ROBIN DUNNE) release three women from a mysterious crypt in Scotland, bringing them back to the Sanctuary for refuge.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: An investigation into a string of bizarre robberies leads Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and Will (ROBIN DUNNE) to a crime ring of thieves who seem to be able to slip between the cracks of the law...literally.

programme.title: Sanctuary
programme.desc: Returning with an abnormal captured in the Himalayas, Magnus (AMANDA TAPPING) and Will (ROBIN DUNNE) are stranded from civilization and aid after their plane goes down in a desolate mountain range.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: An old friend returns to aid Renee (Jayne Heitmeyer) in her Final Conflict with the Atavus.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Police Captain William Boone is caught between two worlds when he is recruited by the Taelons, also known as the "Companions," to become Commander of Security and Interspecies Relations and then secretly drafted to join the human resistance movement.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: Commander William Boone tracks his wife's murderer, determined to find out if the American Companion Da'an or the underground resistance ordered her execution.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A young woman becomes a pawn in power play between the Companions and a charismatic religious leader when her hands are regenerated by Taelon technology.

programme.title: Earth: Final Conflict
programme.desc: A serial killer programmed with a CVI tries to kill Da'an when he enacts an ancient Taelon myth about good conquering evil.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew must stop a world shipbuilder before he launches another invasion.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is kidnapped by Nietscheans and forced to play mind games for the amusement of his captors.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Two Nietzschean siblings are in a stand-off over a weapon that can eliminate higher brain functions. The crew steps in so neither can get the weapon.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Phoenix Coldon
programme.desc: Joe and Shawndrea follow up on a handful of Phoenix sightings since her disappearance and begin to question whether she'd been lured into a new life more dangerous than she could have anticipated; a surprising lead goes to an unexpected locale.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell
programme.desc: A young mother in Utah vanishes and the only suspect, her husband, acts suspiciously; Stephanie Bauer examines never-before-seen home video recordings that shed light on the dramatic events surrounding the disappearance of Susan Cox Powell.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Susan Cox Powell
programme.desc: A defensive husband flees justice after the disappearance of his wife drags both of their families down deeper into destruction and tragedy.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: Crystal Rogers, mother of five, vanishes, leaving her car abandoned in Bardstown, Ky.; a year later her father is shot dead while searching for her; there are multiple cases in a small town shrouded in secrets, and haunted by unsolved killings.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dwayne look through Tommy Ballard's box of papers and evidence in Crystal's case.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: The FBI grills the brother of Crystal's boyfriend, Nick Houck, a Bardstown police officer; Stephanie and Dwayne follow a search of a lake where cadaver dogs pick up a scent; exploring the scene of a deadly ambush on the Bluegrass Parkway.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: An FBI profiler offers chilling insights on a potential killer; family members of Bardstown's other victims speak; a mysterious white car is possibly linked to Crystal's disappearance.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: With the first anniversary of Tommy Ballard's killing approaching, Stephanie and Dwayne dive deeper into the unsolved cases after a new witness steps forward; an unexpected new lead takes them in an unforeseen -- and intriguing -- direction.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Crystal Rogers
programme.desc: Stephanie and Dwayne speak with an informant who shares new information about the crimes in Bardstown; they follow up on the informant's claims and discover potential new details unknown to investigators.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Journalist Maggie Freleng searches for answers in the 2004 disappearance of a nursing student following a car crash in New Hampshire.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: Maggie investigates reasons why Maura Murray secretly drove to New Hampshire and never came home, including a possible pregnancy or an emotional phone call with her sister.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: There are questions about happened to Maura after she crashed on a rural road in New Hampshire: did she run into the woods, hop into a car with someone she knew and escape to a new life in Canada, or worse, hitch a ride with a dangerous stranger.

programme.title: The Disappearance of Maura Murray
programme.desc: New Hampshire's law enforcement community keeps their findings of Maura's case close to the chest; Maggie explores the theories related to a police conspiracy, hoping to break down a decade-long code of silence.

programme.desc: We see a flashback of how Rubble became a member of the Paw Patrol!/When Wally the Walrus gets tangled in an old fishing net, Ryder and the Paw Patrol need to get him to the surface and back to shore safely.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: At cruising altitude, Trish faces a voracious and fleshy mass of a Stand that strikes at the slightest movement. Meanwhile, Giorno’s incessantly pulsating broach, the key to the team’s survival, lies waiting—as does an unseen force within Trish.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bruno and team make an emergency landing in Sardegna where the Hitman Team leader, Risotto, is also determined to uncover a certain mystery. Doppio, a timid, wide-eyed teen, the result of a seemingly impossible pregnancy, has his own goals on the island.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Having discovered there is more to skittish Doppio than meets the eye, Risotto uses his Stand to manifest various metallic instruments of torture from within his enemy. Fortunately for Doppio, a way to foresee the inevitable offers a glimmer of hope.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: A picturesque Sardinian cliff becomes the bloody backdrop to Doppio’s sudden dominance over Risotto, courtesy of Narancia’s own Stand. On the beach below, Abbacchio works to rewind time 15 years to identify the identity of a certain photographer.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Witness destiny unfold for Trish and the rest of Bruno’s team as her father’s cryptic presence and arcane abilities pull the crew into battles of unspeakable brutality.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: As Mista closes in on Sale, all signs seem to point to an easy kill. If only it weren’t for the truck hurtling up a mountainous Capri road stuck to his hand or Sale’s power to freeze all objects, gunman Mista would be celebrating over his enemy’s corpse.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Within arm’s reach of Polpo’s fortune, Bucciarati and team meet the unassuming Pericolo, a capo who has come to accept the treasure. In presenting the loot, Bucciarati is bestowed not only the rank of capo but also an immense duty: protect Trish Una.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure: Hitman Team
programme.desc: After an encounter with the Hitman Team’s Formaggio, Narancia is left wondering why the world is quickly transforming around him. Narancia hunts down his assailant with a hail of bullets as Formaggio tries to understand his attacker’s tracking skills.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Narancia is unshakable as he uses firepower and CO2 detection to survive Formaggio’s body-shrinking attack. Even beneath a spider’s fangs inside Formaggio’s bottle, Narancia reveals not Trish’s whereabouts but the bullet holes his Stand has left behind.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno, Abbacchio and Fugo travel to Pompeii to find a hidden key pivotal in their protection of Trish. Facing the trio, however, is more than the lonely remains of ancient Roman villas and colonnades. Fugo spots an odd figure in an even stranger mirror.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Illuso has pulled Fugo into his mirror world as Abbacchio rushes to retrieve the key, despite Giorno’s stern advice. But Abbacchio cannot escape a similar fate, leaving him and later Giorno to resort to self-mutilation in favor of death by laceration.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Delve into the deadly battles that mold Giorno into an indispensable member of the Passione gang as he and his allies fight to protect Trish and themselves against outlandish acts of violence by members of the Hitman team.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ready to escort Trish by train, the gang finds on the platform a lone turtle lingering by the drinking fountain, just as the boss instructed. But Bucciarati is stumped—departure is imminent, the enemy is closing in, and the cryptic key appears useless.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and gang hide inside a turtle aboard their train hurtling toward Florence as Mista fights to keep Pesci's body-piercing fish hook from ensnaring his brain. Prosciutto, meanwhile, has released his Stand, rapidly aging everyone on board.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: To save his squad, Bucciarati risks all by grabbing hold of Prosciutto and hurling himself off the speeding train, only to be saved by Pesci’s hook. Now, as Pesci savagely fishes for his victim’s heart, Bucciarati’s resolve reaches stunning heights.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Bucciarati and crew head to Venice by car, after a near-death encounter with Pesci. Unbeknownst to them, Melone from the Hitman Team has created an atomizing ancillary Stand from Bruno’s blood and the body of an unsuspecting female train passenger.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Giorno fights transmutation with transmutation as he weaponizes his own severed hand and imbues inanimate objects with life against Melone’s baby Stand. Giorno and team now must learn that the road ahead to Santa Lucia train station is paved with ice.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: Ghiaccio's Stand, White Ice is able to envelop him like a bodysuit and able to freeze everything around him to extremely low temperatures. Giorno and Mista somewhat make it to Venice, despite being partially frozen by Ghiaccio...

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure
programme.desc: By revealing to each other a fearless embrace of the unknown, Giorno and Mista emerge victorious against Ghiaccio. Now, a single member of Bruno’s group must face a single bell tower, a single elevator shaft, and a single menacing task.

programme.title: JoJo's Bizarre Adventure

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Se captura a un sospechoso de robo de identidad con antecedentes. Dos mujeres aprenden a anotar lo que hay en sus maletas. La policía le aconseja a un joven que sus padres quieren lo mejor para él.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una madre con una orden judicial no logra evadir a la policía. Se detiene a un delincuente de tránsito habitual. Se reporta una pelea y los policías encuentran evidencia de una discusión sangrienta.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Un ladrón buscado se rinde tras saltar demasiadas cercas. Un delincuente no quiere salir de la casa de su abuela. Todo es difícil para un hombre con un ciclomotor cuestionable.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Una mujer se pone nerviosa cuando trata de evitar a un oficial en bicicleta. Un policía investiga un robo de carro complicado. Los condimentos que escoge un hombre alerta a la policía con sospechas.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Huyen los vehículos jugando carreras cuando llega la policía. Un conductor vacilón se ríe de su error. Una mujer fugitiva se preocupa más por su higiene oral que por su orden de captura.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The SG-1 team investigates an abandoned Goa'uld ship orbiting the Earth. While they try to salvage the ship, saboteurs attack and the vessel plummets to Earth, deep into the ocean, with O'Neill and his crew trapped inside…and time running out.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An alien that might predate human evolution by 50 million years is discovered in Antarctica and may be part of the race that invented the Stargate. After SG-1 manages to thaw her back to life, they discover she may be the source of a deadly virus.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When a scientist working on stem cell research disappears, Carter, Teal'c and Quinn investigate and discover that the scientist's town is infested with Goa'uld who can only control the citizens by night. Will Carter, Teal'c and Quinn be taken over?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A Goa'uld lord holds O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) captive and tortures him for information about the Tok'ra. As O'Neill suffers, Daniel Jackson (Michael Shanks) appears and offers support. Meanwhile, SG-1 races to O'Neill before it's too late.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.title: Stargate SG-1

programme.desc: Korra and company try to close the spirit portals before the Harmonic Convergence.

programme.title: The Legend of Korra
programme.desc: Beifong must face her past.

programme.desc: Zaheer and his gang try to kidnap Korra.

programme.desc: Trouble in Republic City prevents Korra from beginning her airbending training.

programme.desc: Korra searches for inspiration in the Pro Bending arena.

programme.desc: As Equalist activity continues, Korra faces off against Councilman Tarrlok.

programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara become too sick to travel, Aang heads out on his own to find a cure for them.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang, Katara and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang is afraid his friends might leave him when they find something that reminds them of home.

programme.desc: Aang tries to find a Firebending master to teach him; Katara learns that she has a special power.

programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air Temple.

programme.desc: Aang and Katara look for a Waterbending Master; Sokka falls for a princess.

programme.desc: The Northern Water Tribe braces itself for an attack by Adm. Zhao's Fire Navy Fleet.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: Aang meets an Earth Kingdom general who wants to use his Avatar State as a weapon to defeat the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The children become lost while taking a short cut through a cave.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender
programme.desc: The children return to Omashu so that Aang can learn Earthbending from King Bumi.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Mark investigates when her older lover, a new state Supreme Court Justice, murders a teenage girl.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A Malibu Hills fire is the backdrop for rising tensions between the residents; a disgraced stockbroker, a naturalist, a worried father, and a land developer. A worried Dr. Sloan deals with his own parental fears when Steve helps fight the fire.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: After a woman's car is forced off the road by a hit-and-run, Walker makes a daring rescue of her and her daughter. He is injured and falls into a coma in the hospital. Trivette and others search for the driver of the hit-and-run car.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: An elderly Indian Chief dies. He learns that Chief Six Feathers was killed because he would not sign over his land for development. The chief's relative gets into trouble investigating the death. Walker and Trivette help.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Walker, Trivette, and CD take a vacation together. While there to fish, some men think they are there to find his drug operation. This places the rangers in danger as they are hunted down.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A policeman learns a few other policemen are stealing drugs from the evidence room in order to sell them. He is killed to keep him from telling Alex and Walker. The rangers investigate his death to find the dirty cops.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Car thieves are plaguing the city - they steal a specially adapted van used by a disabled boy. Walker is determined to find it for him. In the process of looking for it, Walker kills one of the thieves - a young boy whom Walker knows.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The daughter of a wealthy Texas businessman is kidnapped by a Japanese gang. The ransom request is for the businessman to turn over his security chief who had been a cop in Japan and was responsible for capturing many of the gang members.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The leaders of a money-laundering operation at a bingo hall are captured and put on trial. The accountant is asked to testify against her bosses. Walker and Trivette have to take her to court, but she keeps escaping them for her own agenda.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Alex gets Walker and Trivette assigned to a movie being filmed as technical advisers. While on the set, Walker overhears several stuntmen talking about a train robbery they are planning.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: The homeless are being beaten by a group of teens who film their attack. Walker poses as a homeless man to see if he can catch them in the act.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: A group of men kidnap a wealthy businessman and take others who were standing near. Alex is one of the people kidnapped. While the kidnappers are arranging for ransom, Alex manages to call Walker with information to help him find them.

programme.title: Walker, Texas Ranger
programme.desc: Men dressed as clowns are robbing banks at gunpoint. During one heist, an ex-partner of Walker's is killed. Walker and Trivette are determined to find the ruthless group. Walker helps the dead ranger's children cope with their loss.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Three months after the execution of Lewis Sweeney, explosions are still rocking the LA area every four days. The unpopular Dr. Sloan continues his efforts to nail Carter Sweeney for the bombings.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver's loyalties are put to the test when the KGB challenges him to steal a touring Chinese artifact in exchange for the release of a woman he once loved.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver heists an ancient Chinese artifact as a ransom for a woman he once loved, only to learn she's double-crossed him.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: When former mobster Jimmy "The Eraser's" new identity is exposed, MacGyver is forced into action to save Jimmy's daughter and grandson.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: While hiking through remote wilderness, MacGyver uncovers an elaborate scheme to siphon oil from a pipeline when he comes to the aid of a young girl, terrorized by the legendary Sasquatch.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver teams up with the sister of a murdered friend to expose a diamond heist operation that they suspect is the work of a diplomat, using his status to shield him from suspicion and arrest.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Working behind the iron curtain to destroy the wreckage of a top-secret jet, MacGyver comes to the aid of a renowned Russian psychic who wishes to defect.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested and thrown into a labor camp, only to discover they are being used by the local authorities to search for some hidden bank robbery loot.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and Nikki are trapped by old nemesis Murdoc and are forced to flee down the side of a sheer rock formation where an old friend of MacGyver's lost her life.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver comes to the aid of college student David Ryman, distraught over losing a Physics contest sponsored by David's father, a professor at MacGyver's alma mater.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Nikki unknowingly becomes the target of an international terrorist group, planning to detonate bombs across the city in exchange for the release of their recently imprisoned leader.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver battles an eccentric scientist whose bizarre biological experiments go out of control and threaten the environment.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: After an accident forces Pete Thornton to retire from the foundation, MacGyver suspects foul play within the organization and uncovers a plot to assassinate a visiting Third World Leader.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver and old buddy Jack Dalton are arrested in France after becoming unwitting accomplices in an international jewel heist.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Stuart's favorite restaurant is about to close, he takes Phil along for one last meal, only to bump into Phil's ex-wife who is now engaged. Holly is baffled by mixed signals from a cute co-worker. Haskell starts an online traffic school

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Holly (Kristen Johnston), determined to find Stuart (David Alan Basche) a date, introduces him to a woman who turns out to be a true professional. Haskell (Wayne Knight) invents a fabulous online lifestyle for himself in order to one-up his ex-wife.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) meets a foreign lingerie model who doesn't speak English and Stuart (David Alan Basche) has to act as interpreter. Eden helps Holly overcome a bad first impression with a handsome neighbor. Haskell buys a coffin as an investment.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison), Stuart (David Alan Basche), and Haskell (Wayne Knight) are forced to trade apartments with Holly (Kristen Johnston) when her mother (Judith Light) comes for a visit because Holly never told her mother her engagement ended months ago.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: When Holly (Kristen Johnston) has to face her cheating ex fiancé for the first time since they broke up, she enlists the guys' help to prove to him he lost the best thing he ever had.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: The gang's relationships are thrown out of whack when Holly discovers there's way more to Stuart than meets the eye.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: During an online lecture, Paige shares a heroic story from Wayne’s past that may or may not be true. The kids take on internet trolls attacking Wayne’s story but start to question if the online community is right about their dad.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Emmett enlists his siblings to help him manufacture t-­‐shirts in the garage, but it turns out the logo Emmett was using is in violation of a charity’s copyright. Now Emmett has to reimburse the charity, but he’s already spent the money.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Bentley's club, “The Sophisticates” is embroiled in a turf war with a rival club, “The Aficionados” over ownership of the best library spot. To solve their problem Bentley hosts a quip-off which quickly devolves into an ill-­mannered affair.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Paige’s judgmental, animal activist sister Rebecca comes for a surprise visit. Tired of being mocked for his simple dinners, Emmett attempts to cook lobster.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Conner fusses over the International Honors Society dinner she is hosting at the Wayney House. Inspired by Conner's club, Emmett creates his own scholastic club for C-students and encourages members to T.P. an A-student's house.

programme.title: Raising Expectations
programme.desc: Paige thinks the Wayneys are too reliant on their electronic devices so she leads them on a family camping trip to The Devil's Ottoman. Paige's plans for them to reconnect with each other and commune with nature are only half-successful.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When the neighborhood DJ is arrested in the middle of a party, Chris steps in for him and proves to be a huge hit with the crowd.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Hoping to get more respect from his classmates and to stop being Caruso's punching bag, Chris signs up to be a hall monitor.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Chris accidentally shows up for school on a "snow day," he and Principal Edwards (Alexander) are stuck with each other until they can reach Chris' parents.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: When Chris thwarts Malvo's attempt at stealing a gold chain from Vanessa, Malvo gives Chris one day - or suffer the consequences - to produce a replacement necklace.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: With their teacher Ms. Morello is out for the day, Chris and Greg decide to cut school and go see the movie "Ghostbusters."

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris is put in a difficult position when he must choose between going to a baseball game with his dad and Drew and going to the movies with Tasha

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: Chris becomes Bed- Stuy's favorite odds-maker after Doc discovers he has a natural talent for predicting a game's outcome.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris
programme.desc: After secretly listening to his parents' comedy albums, tries out some dirty jokes on his classmates and discovers that making people laugh is the key to popularity, but his teacher has a different take on the situation.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After finding a smooth minister to marry her to Fred, Elka becomes a high-maintenance bride, and Victoria tests a perspiration absorbing jumpsuit.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: On the day of Elka and Fred's wedding, Melanie, Victoria, and Joy wake up surrounded by passed-out frat boys, then piece together what happened the night before.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: After her presumed-dead husband comes back into her life, Elka runs away with him, as Victoria exploits her bogus same-sex marriage to Joy for publicity.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: On a gay cruise, Victoria and Joy continue the charade that they are married, while Melanie runs into her sister and her girlfriend.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: When the dry cleaners misdeliver her favorite dress to a woman who then dies, Melanie crashes the funeral with Victoria, Joy and Elka to retrieve it undetected.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Melanie, Victoria and Joy put their Midwestern neighbors on an L.A. weight-loss regimen, while Elka lies about her age to keep up with spontaneous thrill-seeker Roy.

programme.title: Hot in Cleveland
programme.desc: Victoria dates a hand model, Roy's mother dislikes Elka, Joy can't figure out the age of the guy she's seeing, and Melanie's boyfriend resembles Winnie-the-Pooh.

programme.desc: Leah flirts with the idea of getting back together with Jeremy, Isaac struggles with Javi's impending deployment, and Jenelle's birthday trip to New York turns sour after a text from Nathan.

programme.desc: In this spectacular episode, Javi says a tearful goodbye to his family before deployment. Jenelle meets with Nathan, fueling David's jealousy. Corey and Leah face off at Ali's doctor's appointment. Chelsea and Cole debate changing Aubree's last name.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Corey go to court over custody of the twins, Jenelle agrees to let Nathan see Kaiser after David volunteers to be a mediator, and Kailyn tries to help Isaac with Javi's deployment.

programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole meet Jason Aldean before seeing him in concert, Kailyn and Javi struggle with being apart during his deployment, and Leah gets troubling news about her custody agreement.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah and Miranda make amends, Aubree asks Adam why he didn't show up to her father-daughter dance, and Kailyn rebuilds her relationship with Jo while distancing herself from Javi.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Javi's long-distance marriage is on the rocks, Chelsea celebrates milestones with Aubree, and Leah's relationship with Jeremy hits a bump despite her strides with Corey.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn goes skydiving as a way of coping with changes in her marriage, Adam airs his frustrations with the show, and Leah breaks down after almost missing Ali and Aleeah's T-ball game.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Leah struggles with Addie missing her father, Kailyn starts summer school with some extra help from Jo, and Chelsea meets up with Adam's other ex to discuss their kids' father.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea shares exciting news with Aubree and her production team, Kailyn and Javi come to a decision about their marriage, and Leah finds a new home for herself and the girls.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Chelsea announces her pregnancy to family and friends, Leah and Jeremy struggle to communicate after he returns from a work trip, and Kailyn prepares for Javi to come home from deployment.

programme.title: Teen Mom 2
programme.desc: Kailyn and Javi adjust to their newly separate lives, Chelsea finds out Adam is behind on child support, Leah plans a vacation with the girls, and Jenelle and David have a secret.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma atrapa a Fernando con una mujer en la cama, él envuelve a Gabriela en otra mentira y pelea con Norma en el balcón desde donde cae por accidente. Concha salva a los Reyes de una emboscada.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Fernando aprovecha su quebranto para manipular a Gabriela y amenaza de muerte a Norma. Franco cree que ella y Sara corren peligro y les recomienda que salgan de la hacienda cuanto antes.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora tiene en la mira de un fusil a Sara y espera la orden de Rosario para disparar mientras Franco y Óscar organizan una fiesta para su sobrino Juan David. Mejora la relación de Ruth y Eva.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Tras salir del hospital, Fernando se apura a ejecutar su plan y ataca a Norma con la complicidad de sus mayordomos. Gabriela empieza a desconfiar al hallar a Malcolm y Carmela en su cuarto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Óscar le da su merecido a Fernando, quien pone a Gabriela a elegir entre él y sus hijas, las hermanas convencen a Jimena de que se mude, Armando le pide a Rosario que no vuelva a la hacienda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Dínora le advierte a Belinda que no revele su paradero, pero Martín ya sabe que ella visita la hacienda. Los Reyes organizan la bienvenida a Jimena, Franco les regala a ella y Óscar una casa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan siente envidia de Óscar y Jimena y presiona a Norma para que también se mude a la hacienda. En un arrebato de celos, Concha llega a la fiesta y le dispara a Leonidas al verlo con Melisa.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma asiste a la exposición de caballos, Carmela hostiga a la empleada que cuida al bebé y se queda con él con malas intenciones, Norma se devuelve a tiempo y la saca a empujones del cuarto.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Las Elizondo se preocupan por los pésimos resultados obtenidos en la feria de caballos y descubren que Fernando vendió los mejores ejemplares de la hacienda, Gabriela lo encara y él la enreda.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Sara ve a Malcolm cuando espía a Norma en la tina y las dos lo acorralan para caerle a golpes. Quintina y Dominga se van a las manos por Olegario, Ruth se entera de quién es su verdadera mamá.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Norma revisa los informes de la hacienda y comprueba sus sospechas, Eva detiene a Ruth cuando se marcha de la casa y le aclara por qué la abandonó, Quintina y Dominga se vengan de Olegario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Juan llega con la policía a reclamarle a Fernando la golpiza a Olegario, ambos son llevados a la comisaría. Por las noches la hacienda Elizondo se convierte en un casino de apuestas y negocios.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
